Apply Now!

Own a TrueKnack Franchise

Partner with India's premier retail banking institute and build a high-returns educational business in your city.

Home / Franchise

Franchise Opportunities in Key Cities

We are exclusively expanding our footprints in 3 high-demand cities in Maharashtra. Establish a center and groom job-ready banking professionals.

Pune

Pune is the leading educational hub of Maharashtra with hundreds of colleges and fresh graduates seeking secure private sector jobs. Highly lucrative market for retail banking courses.

Enquire Now

Nagpur

As the largest commercial hub of Central India, Nagpur represents an immense pool of ambitious graduates. Tap into a vast recruiter network and high enrollment volumes.

Enquire Now

Sambhajinagar

A rapidly growing industrial and academic city. High demand for quality vocational training and job placement services makes Sambhajinagar a premium launchpad for a center.

Enquire Now

Why Partner with TrueKnack?

Gain access to a proven academic model, robust recruiter relationships, and operational templates developed by industry veterans.

Established Brand & Model

Leverage the trust of a premier institute with over 6,000+ placements and years of experience in retail banking training.

100% Placement Support

Our centralized placement team handles all recruitment tie-ups, bank panels, and student interviews directly.

Comprehensive Marketing Assistance

Get professional leads, digital campaigns, center branding assets, banners, brochures, and training resources.

Ex-Banker Faculty Network

Benefit from live online classes conducted directly by our experienced ex-banker trainers, keeping academic quality high and uniform.

Franchise Inquiry Form

Submit your details below and our corporate alliance manager will get back to you with the franchise proposal kit.

Grooming university graduates into high-performing professional retail banking assets. The Knack of Finding True Talent.
